answers: Satellites orbit Earth for communication, navigation, weather, imaging, and science. GPS uses 30+ satellites.
Types: LEO (low earth, fast data), MEO (navigation/GPS), GEO (geostationary, TV/weather), and HEO (high elliptical).
Satellite internet: Starlink (LEO constellation) provides internet globally. 40,000+ satellites planned for full coverage.
How they work: launched on rockets, orbit at specific altitudes, communicate via radio waves, powered by solar panels.
